_note: Notable speakers and thought leaders at YPDS Jakarta 2026. Updates as speakers are confirmed.

speakers.name: Diplomatic Leaders & Regional Experts
speakers.title: YPDS Keynote Panel
speakers.bio: Leading diplomats, policy makers, and strategists from Asia, Europe, Africa, and the Mediterranean region sharing insights on international affairs, regional security, and cross-cultural diplomacy.

speakers.name: Conflict Resolution & Peace Studies Specialists
speakers.title: Peace by Peaceful Means Workshop
speakers.bio: Experts in negotiation, mediation, and conflict resolution sharing frameworks for youth leaders to engage in peace-building initiatives.

speakers.name: Communications & Advocacy Leaders
speakers.title: Strategic Communication Masterclass
speakers.bio: Veteran communicators and media strategists revealing techniques for effective advocacy, narrative-building, and influence in modern diplomacy.
